data.story_message:
First,
Luke tried their best to Repair Tha Barn but accidentally created a whole new opening for the cows to fucking escape. Vrock and Jared were both very disappointed in Luke.
Then,
Vrock tried their best to Mow Tha Lawn but the lawnmower refused to start. Luke and Jared were both very disappointed in Vrock.
Finally,
Jared tried their best to Lift Tha Hay but they got squashed like a bug. Luke and Vrock were both very disappointed in Jared.

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!

First,
Luke tried their best to Build Tha Fence but forgot to put up the posts first, so it's basically just a bunch of random boards lying on the ground. Fucking retard. Vrock and Jared were both very disappointed in Luke.
Then,
Vrock tried their best to Harvest tha Crops but couldn't find the damn tractor. Luke and Jared were both very disappointed in Vrock.
Due to due to throwing out his back riding the mechanical bull at the local bar, Vrock became injured and will miss 2 matchday(s).
Finally,
Jared tried their best to Push Tha Car but the car stayed put. Sounds like someone forgot to put it in neutral. Luke and Vrock were both very disappointed in Jared.

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!

First,
Luke tried their best to Fix Tha Tractor but accidentally transformed it into an expensive paperweight. Vrock and Jared were both very disappointed in Luke.
Then,
Vrock was ready to work, but due to their previous injury they failed and collected no points.
Finally,
Jared tried their best to Push Tha Car and succeeded! Now, who's pushing him? The cows mooed in approval!

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!

First,
Luke tried their best to Fix Tha Tractor but accidentally transformed it into an expensive paperweight. Vrock and Jared were both very disappointed in Luke.
Then,
Vrock tried their best to Chase Tha Coyote but the coyote hit him with a crate of dynamite. Classic Wile E. move. Luke and Jared were both very disappointed in Vrock.
Finally,
Jared tried their best to Shovel Tha Manure but he failed. That's wasn't cowshit... that was BULLSHIT! Luke and Vrock were both very disappointed in Jared.

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!

First,
Luke tried their best to Repair Tha Barn but instead built a new home for a family of squirrels who are now demanding rent. Vrock and Jared were both very disappointed in Luke.
Then,
Vrock tried their best to Milk Tha Cow but the cow looked at him and said, 'Do i looked like the Dairy Queen to you'? Luke and Jared were both very disappointed in Vrock.
Finally,
Jared tried their best to Lift Tha Hay and he actually did it...I didn't think he had it in him. The cows mooed in approval!

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!
